description: SHM region memory layout — offsets for cross-language implementation

slot_count.description: Number of slot pairs in region.

server_seq.description: Server increments after writing CALL to request area.

sidecar_seq.description: Sidecar increments after writing RESULT to response area.

request_len.description: Byte length of CALL frame in request area.

response_len.description: Byte length of RESULT frame in response area.

request_crc.description: CRC32 of (request_len as LE bytes ++ request payload).

response_crc.description: CRC32 of (response_len as LE bytes ++ response payload).

slot_state.description: Explicit lifecycle state: 0=free, 1=call_written, 2=result_written. Written by both server and sidecar at state transitions.

crc_convention.description: CRC32 is computed over: u32 LE payload_len bytes ++ payload bytes

coordination.server_to_sidecar: Server writes request area + request_len + request_crc + slot_state, then increments server_seq with release ordering. Sidecar busy-polls server_seq.
coordination.sidecar_to_server: Sidecar writes response area + response_len + response_crc + slot_state, then increments sidecar_seq with release ordering. Server busy-polls sidecar_seq.
